description: Archetype schema for fx_organic_growth L1 verification. Task GT JSON embeds a task-specific verification_schema block conforming to this shape.

segment_shape.label: filing segment name, e.g. EMEA
segment_shape.revenue_bounds_usd_millions: [min, max] plausibility band for wrong_region trap

fx_instrument_shape.label: e.g. EUR/USD weighted-average
fx_instrument_shape.note: Omit fx_instruments or use empty array when filing does not disclose WAE rate tables (e.g. PEP FY2025). Verify script skips instrument checks when absent.
